35994.description: Kai Pyrewick was first described as short, heavyset, silver streaked hair, blue eyes, with bold bearing.

35995.description: Jarek Jaspmarsh the 5th was first described as towering, sturdy, fair hair, green eyes, with somber bearing.

35996.description: Ora Galreach the 2nd was first described as tall, slender, closely shorn hair, green eyes, with alert bearing.

35997.description: Ulf Quilwold the 2nd was first described as tall, broad shouldered, closely shorn hair, dark eyes, with restless bearing.

35998.description: Ivo Rivmere the 2nd was first described as tall, sturdy, auburn hair, amber eyes, with restless bearing.

35999.description: Mira Ashford the 3rd was first described as tall, lean, auburn hair, blue eyes, with calm bearing.
